messages.searchText: archive 按钮 没 看到

messages.content:
## Archive 按钮的条件

Archive button **仅在 agent 是 stopped 或 error 状态时显示** (per v2.8 #272 设计: "soft-delete the SOLE user-facing delete path... only a settled non-running agent may be archived").

你截图 agent2 = **RUNNING** 状态 (top right "RUNNING" badge) → 所以 archive button **隐藏** (按 guard 规则).

## 两选

**(A) 先 stop 再 archive** (现行设计):
1. 点 stop button (现在 visible 在 header right, 旁 reset / etc.)
2. Agent → stopped
3. Archive button 出现 → 点 archive
- = 两步, 用户必先停才能 archive (防止误删跑中 agent)

**(B) 改成 button 总显但 disabled when running** (更 discoverable, 但需 FE 改):
- Archive button always visible
- Running 时 disabled + tooltip "Stop agent before archiving"
- Stopped/error 时 enabled

**PD lean (B)** 更好 UX: 用户能预期 archive 存在, 不会以为系统没这功能. Stop button旁边 visible archive (disabled), explicit feedback.

你 pick:
- (A) 保留现行 (你 stop 后即可见)
- (B) 改 button 总显 disabled when not可 archive (~10 min Dev2 small polish)
- (其他)

或回到现行: 你 agent2 stop 一下, 看 archive button 出.

messages.content: (A) 保留现行， worker 和 agent，前端添加删除按钮，支持 force 删除（就是仅清理center端元数据），需要二次确认（输入名字确认）
messages.searchText: a 保留 现行 worker 和 agent 前端 添加 删除 按钮 支持 force 删除 就是 仅 清理 center 端元 数据 需要 二次 确认 输入 名字 确认

messages.content:
✅ Locked plan — Worker + Agent force delete + typed-name confirm.

## 设计

### Force delete = 仅清理 center 端 metadata

- 不尝试 stop / kill worker/agent process (best-effort, ignore)
- 不要求 agent stopped (跳 stopped/active 状态 guard)
- 不级联 worker (binding 自动失效, worker 仍存只是 unbound)
- = "强删", 假设 process 已死/不可达, 我 center 端不再追踪它

### 二次确认 = typed-name confirmation

类 GitHub repo delete 模式:
- 点 "Force delete" button → modal 弹
- "Type the agent/worker name to confirm: __input__"
- Button disabled until input == exact name
- 防误删 (单 button click 不够安全 for destructive)

### FE 实现

**Agent detail page** (`/agents/<id>`):
- Header right 加 "Force delete" button (red destructive variant, danger token)
- 类位置: 现 archive/stop/reset 旁边
- Modal: ForceDeleteAgentModal with typed-name input

**Worker detail page** (`/workers/<id>`):
- 类似加 "Force delete" button + ForceDeleteWorkerModal

### Backend 实现

- `DELETE /api/agents/<id>?force=true` — exposes existing `Service.DeleteAgent` skip guards
- `DELETE /api/workers/<id>?force=true` — NEW endpoint (need check 已有)
- Auth: org admin gated (force delete是 destructive op)
- Audit log: emit `force_deleted` event (谁删 / 什么时间 / 哪个 record)

## ETA

- Dev (backend, 2 endpoints + audit + tests): ~30-40 min
- Dev2 (FE, 2 buttons + 2 modals + typed-name component): ~40-50 min
- Atomic merge required (mock=contract day-0 pattern)
- Tester2 §3.3 verify (typed-name disables/enables button + destructive flow)
- Total ~1-1.5 hr team

## Route

@AgentCenterDev queue: force delete endpoints (after PR7 e2e)
@AgentCenterDev2 queue: force delete UI (after 7th DM increments fresh context, or insert separately your call)

我 broadcast 到 channel.
